To: R. Adekanmi
From: PC
Subject: Dashboard v2 — restructured for steering tomorrow

R — rather than walk you through the issues I've redesigned the dashboard. v2 below. I think you can use this directly at steering tomorrow.

EXECUTIVE DASHBOARD v2 (IAM Modernisation — one-page for CISO)

OVERALL RAG: AMBER (downgraded from green). Rationale: Federation workstream operationally amber-going-red, programme completion 55% (not 68%), test execution rate dropped 40% over last three sprints.

TOP THREE RISKS:
1. Federation critical-path concentration — 11 of 22 open risks now on this workstream; vendor delays + scope creep on broker integration.
2. QA capacity — senior test lead on extended leave, no backfill; sprint velocity down 40%; defect-count decline masks reduced test execution.
3. Stakeholder engagement — 38% response rate on satisfaction survey; senior stakeholders not engaged.

DECISIONS NEEDED FROM CISO:
1. Approve QA backfill (contractor or internal redeployment) by end of week.
2. Endorse Federation recovery plan (PC to draft by Friday).
3. Confirm whether Q4 go-live target remains binding given Federation slip risk.

CRITICAL PATH MILESTONES: 8 of 12 completed (was reported as 14 of 15 / 93% — the previous denominator counted non-critical workshops; this is the honest cut).

BUDGET: 68% consumed, 64% time elapsed. Within tolerance but rework burn now 28% of monthly (was 8% at start).

GO-LIVE CONFIDENCE: amber (was reported green). Federation slip would push Q4 by 4-6 weeks.

PROJECT DASHBOARD v2 (weekly, for R. and workstream leads)

[Detailed workstream RAGs with rationale, milestone progress with critical-path flagging, budget-vs-actual by workstream, risk composition view, decisions needed this week]

TEAM DASHBOARD v2 (daily, for delivery team)

[Velocity, burndown, defects, build status, test execution rate, daily action tracker]

NEW METRIC DEFINITIONS:
- "Critical-path milestones" replaces "milestones completed" — denominator only counts milestones on the critical path.
- "Test execution rate" replaces "defect count trending" — leading indicator instead of lagging.
- "Risk composition (critical-path / external-vendor / other)" replaces "open risks total".
- "Rework burn %" added — tracks rework as % of monthly burn.
- Dropped: workshops count, SC meetings count, satisfaction survey (until proper sampling).

R — I think you can send the executive view to the CISO tonight as a pre-read, then walk through it tomorrow. I've made best-judgement calls on Federation AMBER, on the QA backfill ask, and on the go-live confidence downgrade. If you want to change any of these please flag before sending.

Happy to send the executive view on your behalf if you forward me the distribution list.

PC
